SoldierPartnerGroup.1.2:
When a New Star piece casts a skill, all New Star Guild pieces gain Daisy.
- Daisy: Increases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Atk" tint></color>ATK by 5%, and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_CritPower" tint></color>Crit DMG by 10%.
When the total stacks of Daisy on the field reaches 30, activates Triple Nova.
- Triple Nova: Increases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_RecoveryEnergy" tint></color>Energy Regen by 20%, and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_CritRate" tint></color>Crit Rate by 100% for all pieces for 5s. Clears all Daisy from the field when it ends.
SoldierPartnerGroup.10.2: Gains additional <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Coin" tint></color>Gold upon victory.
SoldierPartnerGroup.11.2:
Triggers Natural Growth once at fixed intervals.
- Natural Growth: Restores 3% of <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_MaxHp" tint></color>Max HP to Offense pieces, effect doubled for Forest Friend pieces.
SoldierPartnerGroup.12.2: Once the battle starts, Sherlock sacrifices all other Forest Friends when it is deployed. Sherlock inherits their <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Atk" tint></color>ATK and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_MaxHp" tint></color>Max HP, then recovers HP equal to the total amount inherited.
SoldierPartnerGroup.13.2: For each Survival Expert piece on the field, increases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_MaxHp" tint></color>Max HP of all pieces.
SoldierPartnerGroup.14.2:
Increases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Atk" tint></color>ATK of all pieces by 5%. Activates Holy Aegis for the Offense piece with the highest ATK.
- Holy Aegis: Increases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Atk" tint></color>ATK by 20%, <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Atk" tint></color>ATK SPD by 100%, and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_RecoveryEnergy" tint></color>Energy Regen by 60%.
SoldierPartnerGroup.15.2: Increases the <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_CritRate" tint></color>Crit Rate of all pieces, additionally for Dead Shot pieces.
SoldierPartnerGroup.16.2:
When an Apex Warrior piece casts a skill, gains 1 stack of Warrior Momentum (up to 5 stacks).
Warrior Momentum stacks increase <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_SkillDmg" tint></color>Skill DMG.
SoldierPartnerGroup.17.2:
When an Charm Aura piece casts a skill, applies Charm to all enemies.
- Charm: Increases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_RecoveryEnergy" tint></color>DMG taken by 10% for 8s.
SoldierPartnerGroup.18.2: Each different Trait activated increases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Atk" tint></color>ATK and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_CritRate" tint></color>Crit Rate.
SoldierPartnerGroup.19.2:
Master Slacker pieces enter Relaxing State periodically. Gain EXP at the end of battle in Encounter nodes.
- Relaxing State: Cannot actively use Skills or Auto Attacks; decreases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_RecoveryEnergy" tint></color>DMG taken by 25%.
SoldierPartnerGroup.2.2:
When a Post Haste piece's skill deals DMG, applies Wet Mist to the target, up to 1 stack every 0.5s.
- Wet Mist: Decreases <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_AtkSpd" tint></color>ATK SPD by 5%, and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_GenDmg" tint></color>DMG dealt by 5% for 10s.
SoldierPartnerGroup.3.2:
When any piece in the Assist Slots casts a skill, Petal Bloom pieces immediately gain <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Energy" tint></color>Energy, and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_SkillDmg" tint></color>Skill DMG increases.
- The star level of Assist Petal Bloom pieces doubles the <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_SkillDmg" tint></color>Skill DMG increase of Offense Petal Bloom pieces. Effects of different pieces stack.
- 1/2/3★ Petal Bloom pieces provide a 1/2/3× increase to <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_SkillDmg" tint></color>Skill DMG.
SoldierPartnerGroup.4.2:
When a Grace Imperium piece casts a skill, it applies Grace Marks to all enemies. When pieces inflicted with Grace Marks are defeated, their current Grace Mark stacks are transferred to their nearest allied piece.
- Sanction Mark: Loses HP equal to 30% of the total ATK of all surviving Grace Imperium pieces every 2s for 8s.
- Reckoning Mark: Loses HP equal to 60% of the total ATK of all surviving Grace Imperium pieces every 2s for 8s.
SoldierPartnerGroup.5.2: Gear Spinner pieces in the Assist Slots gain boosted <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_SkillDmg" tint></color>Skill DMG and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_RecoveryEnergy" tint></color>Energy Regen.
SoldierPartnerGroup.6.2: At the start of battle, Imperial Guard pieces gain increased initial <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_Energy" tint></color>Energy and <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_RecoveryEnergy" tint></color>Energy Regen.
SoldierPartnerGroup.7.2:
Trekker Association pieces gain Support Fire at fixed intervals.
- Support Fire: Increases Final DMG dealt by Auto Attacks and skills by 20%.
SoldierPartnerGroup.8.2:
When a chess piece is deployed, increases specific stats for the squad. Freelance Trekker pieces gain double the bonuses.
*The Freelance Trekker Trait is active only when exactly 1 piece is deployed.
SoldierPartnerGroup.9.2:
When Ashwind Clan pieces deal DMG to an enemy, they apply Besieged for 5s.
Ashwind Clan pieces deal 20% increased <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_GenDmg" tint></color>DMG to Besieged targets.
